//: TASK-P0-CI-001 — markdownlint config for plan/, compliance/, and the few README files we author.
// MD013 (line length): Disabled — plan docs use long table rows that would line-wrap badly.
// MD024 (no duplicate headings): Allow when nested under different parents (e.g. multiple ## Files (create/modify) sections).
// MD007 (ul-indent): Plan docs use 2-space indents; default is 2 — keep but be permissive.
// MD033 (no-inline-html): Allow <details> / <summary> for collapsible sections in long docs.
// MD041 (first-line h1): Some files (CHANGELOG, .gitattributes-style notes) start with a comment block.
// MD046 (code block style): Force fenced — table-cell code spans don't trigger this anyway.
